content.cn_text: 下周是我们镇的国际周，这项活动已经连续举办了好几年，
content.en_text: Next week is our town's International Week, which has been going on annually for several

content.cn_text: 每年都会举行。
content.en_text: years.

content.cn_text: 今天我们请到了国际周的组织者 George Johnson 来谈谈这项活动。
content.en_text: Today we have George Johnson, the organizer of International Week, to talk about it.

content.cn_text: George，这一切是怎么开始的？
content.en_text: George, how did it all begin?

content.cn_text: 嗯，五年前一个二月的日子，我和镇上的一群商人在一起，我们
content.en_text: Well, I was with a group of businessmen in town one February day, five years ago, and we

content.cn_text: 正在讨论在八月天气好的时候，我们可以做些什么来让小镇热闹起来，
content.en_text: were discussing what we could do for livening things up in August when the weather is good,

content.cn_text: 而且孩子们一直到九月才开学。
content.en_text: and the kids are out of school till September.

content.cn_text: 有人说，嘿，我们这里住着来自世界各地的人，不如举办
content.en_text: And someone said, hey, we've got people from all over the world living here, let's have

content.cn_text: 一场国际庆祝活动，让大家展示自己祖国的东西。
content.en_text: an international celebration and get people to show off things about their home country.

content.cn_text: 我们都同意了。
content.en_text: And we all agreed.

content.cn_text: 第一年，庆祝活动只持续了一天，展示了三个国家。
content.en_text: The first year, the celebration lasted just one day, and it featured three countries.

content.cn_text: 活动非常成功，还被我们的当地报纸报道了。
content.en_text: It was a great success and was written about in our local newspaper.

content.cn_text: 所以第二年，尽管费用更高，组织者还是把它扩展成了一个国际
content.en_text: And so the next year, even though it costs more, the organizers expanded it to an international

content.cn_text: 周，很多人都渴望展示自己的国家。
content.en_text: week, and so many people were eager to feature their countries.

content.cn_text: 在这一周的前六天里，每天会指定一个国家作为主角。
content.en_text: On each of the first six days of the week, one country is designated to star.

content.cn_text: 然后在第七天，如果天气允许，我们会在市政厅附近举办街头派对，
content.en_text: And then on the seventh day, weather permitting, we have a street party near the town hall

content.cn_text: 音乐由广播电台提供，还有食物和游戏。
content.en_text: with music provided by the radio station and food and games.

content.cn_text: 大家都玩得很开心。
content.en_text: Everyone has a ball.

content.cn_text: 当然，如果像去年那样下雨，我们会把活动移到学校体育馆，但没人介意。
content.en_text: Of course, we move it to the school gym if it rains like last year, but nobody minds.

content.cn_text: 我们的筹备年度从一月开始，那时我们开始征集申请。
content.en_text: Our year starts in January, when we ask for applications.

content.cn_text: 申请为自己的国家争取一天活动时间的人，不需要属于某个特定的
content.en_text: To apply to have a day for their country, people don't need to belong to a particular

content.cn_text: 国家协会。
content.en_text: country association.

content.cn_text: 他们只需要是一个认同某个特定国家的团体即可。
content.en_text: They can just be a group who identified themselves with a particular country.

content.cn_text: 他们需要向我们提交一份正式计划。
content.en_text: They submit a formal plan to us.

content.cn_text: 在这个阶段他们不需要担心资金，不过有些补助可以申请。
content.en_text: They don't need to worry at this stage about funding, but some grants are available.

content.cn_text: 组织委员会必须选择那些有最佳想法的申请。
content.en_text: The organizing committee has to select the ones with the best ideas.

content.cn_text: 组织委员会会为各国家安排场地，让他们做想做的活动。
content.en_text: The organizing committee arranges for places for the country to do whatever they want.

content.cn_text: 遗憾的是，对于大型户外活动，我们不能使用当地体育场，
content.en_text: Unfortunately, for large outdoor activities, we aren't allowed to use the local stadium

content.cn_text: 因为那里有其他安排。
content.en_text: because they've got other commitments.

content.cn_text: 但社区中心允许我们使用它的停车场。
content.en_text: But the community center lets us use its parking lot.

content.cn_text: 大厅有点小，但他们很友善，允许我们使用它的
content.en_text: The hall is kind of small, but it has been kind enough to permit us to make use of its

content.cn_text: 教室。
content.en_text: classrooms.

content.cn_text: 当地人非常慷慨。
content.en_text: Local people have been very generous.

content.cn_text: 许多商人会在这一周借给我们桌子和扩音器之类的东西。
content.en_text: A lot of business people let us have things like tables and amplifiers for the week.

content.cn_text: 组织委员会处理所有行政事务，镇图书馆也
content.en_text: The organizing committee handles all the administration, and the town library has

content.cn_text: 很好地展示了关于这些国家的书籍。
content.en_text: been great about featuring books about the countries.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余节目之前，你有一些时间查看第17至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the program, you have some time to look at questions 17-20.

content.cn_text: 现在，对于每个国家日，我们会要求他们举办一个特别活动，比如表演、展览
content.en_text: Now, for each country's day, we ask them to have one special event like a show or exhibition

content.cn_text: 或展示。
content.en_text: or demonstration.

content.cn_text: 例如，有些人可以展示他们如何制作传统手工艺品。
content.en_text: For example, some people could show how they make traditional handicrafts.

content.cn_text: 或者也可以只是一个展览，比如展示该国家的照片。
content.en_text: Or it might just be an exhibition, say photographs of the country.

content.cn_text: 很有意思。
content.en_text: Interesting.

content.cn_text: 那么，今年有哪些特别活动呢？
content.en_text: Now, what are the special events this year?

content.cn_text: 有很多精彩活动。
content.en_text: Fantastic things.

content.cn_text: 星期一是墨西哥日，这些女士和先生们将带来一场表演，
content.en_text: Monday is Mexico Day, and these ladies and gentlemen are going to put on a show that's

content.cn_text: 比他们著名的辣椒还要火热。
content.en_text: hotter than those chili peppers they're famous for eating.

content.cn_text: 他们会唱歌和演奏歌曲，那些鼓声会让你想站起来
content.en_text: They'll be singing and playing songs, and those drums will make you want to get up and

content.cn_text: 跟着动起来。
content.en_text: move around.

content.cn_text: 然后星期二是南非日，他们有一个裙装和长袍展览，这些服饰用于
content.en_text: Then Tuesday is South Africa Day, and they've got an exhibition of dresses and robes used

content.cn_text: 传统仪式和舞蹈，非常壮观。
content.en_text: in traditional ceremonies and dances, and they are magnificent.

content.cn_text: 显然，其中一些价值甚至超过等重的黄金。
content.en_text: Apparently, some of them are worth more than their weight in gold.

content.cn_text: 接下来，星期三是印度尼西亚日。
content.en_text: Next, Wednesday is Indonesia Day.

content.cn_text: 他们有一个展览，你肯定会觉得物有所值。
content.en_text: They have an exhibition where you'll definitely get your money's worth.

content.cn_text: 两位女士会戴上厨师帽，展示她们如何准备那些菜肴
content.en_text: Two ladies will put on their chef's hat to demonstrate how they prepare those dishes

content.cn_text: 和酱料，这些都是她们出名的东西。
content.en_text: and sauces they're famous for.

content.cn_text: 让我看看。
content.en_text: Let's see.

content.cn_text: 接下来是星期四，加拿大日。
content.en_text: That brings us to Thursday, Canada Day.

content.cn_text: 我们会想到他们是健康的户外人士和冰球运动员，但他们安排了
content.en_text: We think of them as fit outdoorsmen and ice hockey players, but they've arranged to

content.cn_text: 一些同胞向我们展示如何只用一把刀和来自
content.en_text: have some of their countrymen show us how they use just a knife and blocks of wood from

content.cn_text: 北美原生树木的木块，制作非常漂亮的鸟、熊和其他
content.en_text: native American trees to make absolutely lovely statues of birds and bears and other

content.cn_text: 当地传说中著名动物的雕像。
content.en_text: animals famous in local legends.

content.cn_text: 接下来是星期五，意大利日。
content.en_text: So next is Friday, Italy Day.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section two.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C
groups.title: Questions 11–16

items.title: The businessmen think it is a good idea to hold the international week in
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问商人们认为在哪个月举办国际周比较好，原文说 livening things up in August，因此答案是 B。

items.title: Why did they change the celebration from one day to a week?

options.title: A
options.content: it was reported by the media.

options.title: B
options.content: they want to raise additional money.

options.title: C
options.content: people would like to show off their countries.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问为什么从一天改成一周，原文说written about in our local newspaper，对应A “media”，然后导致的第二年的活动变成了一周而不是一天，然后导致了很多人渴望展示自己的国家。

items.title: In bad weather, where did they hold the activity last time?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问上次天气不好时活动在哪里举行，原文说 if it rains like last year, move it to the school gym，因此答案是 A。

items.title: In order to apply for the celebration, people should

options.title: B
options.content: be a member of a country association.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问申请庆祝活动需要做什么，原文说 submit a formal plan，并选择 best ideas，对应 A “provide a good proposal”。

items.title: Where do they hold big outdoor activities?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问大型户外活动在哪里举行，原文说 use its parking lot，因此答案是 C。

items.title: What do the businessmen provide to the international week?

options.title: A
options.content: pay for the cost of the administration

items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问商人为国际周提供什么，原文说 things like tables and amplifiers，对应 B “furniture and equipment”。

groups.desc: Choose the correct answers from the box, from A–G, next to questions
groups.title: Questions 17–20

items.title: Mexico
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Mexico 的特色，原文说 singing and playing songs，对应 A “music”。

items.title: South Africa
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 South Africa 的特色，原文说 exhibition of dresses and robes，对应 F “costumes”。

items.title: Indonesia
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 Indonesia 的特色，原文说 chef’s hat 和 prepare dishes and sauces，对应 E “cookery”。

items.title: Canada
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 Canada 的特色，原文说 use a knife and blocks of wood to make statues，对应 C “wood carving”。
